CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AUG-18-2005 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. calendar.matters:
CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Staci Dresher, Esq., appearing for Defendant and Cross-Complainant. No appearance for Plaintiff. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. At the request of Defendant's counsel the court ordered Cross-Complaint Dismissed. Proceedings reported by: Lori Cheshire, CSR#12958. (212)

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
